ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary Confirmation – Flight 9876
ham.body:
Dear John Doe,

Thank you for booking with SkyHigh Airlines. Your flight itinerary is confirmed as follows:

• Flight number: SH9876
• Departure: New York (JFK) – 07:45 AM, 15 Sep 2024
• Arrival: Los Angeles (LAX) – 10:30 AM, 15 Sep 2024
• Seat assignment: 12A (Aisle)
• Cabin class: Economy
• Baggage allowance: 1 checked bag (23 kg) and 1 carry‑on (7 kg)
• Special service request: Vegetarian meal

Please review your itinerary and let us know if any changes are required. For additional services, such as seat upgrades or travel insurance, visit <URL>.

We look forward to welcoming you aboard.

Best regards,
SkyHigh Airlines Reservations
contact@skyhigh.com

spam.subject: Urgent: Income Tax Department Refund Verification Required
spam.body:
Dear Mr. Singh,

This is an official notice from the Income Tax Department regarding a pending refund of INR 75,000 for the year 2023. Due to recent changes in tax regulations, we must verify your personal details before processing the refund.

Please provide the following information at your earliest convenience:
• Full name and PAN number
• Bank account details (account number, IFSC code, and account holder name)
• A scanned copy of your latest bank statement

To submit the information securely, click <URL> and complete the verification form. Failure to comply within 48 hours may result in delay of your refund.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

S. R. Patel
Senior Officer
Income Tax Department
contact@itd.gov.in
